# Author manifest for scripts

## 🧱 PART 1: Build Your R Package

### ✅ Create the Package Structure
In RStudio:

`usethis::create_package("~/.manifestaddin")`

This creates a proper R package structure with:
```
DESCRIPTION
NAMESPACE
R/
.Rproj
```

## ✍ PART 2: Add the Manifestation Function (Core)

`R/insert_manifestation.R`

```r
#' Insert Manifestation Header
#' 
#' @param script_name Optional script name
#' @param purpose Script purpose
#' @param author Author name
#' @param email Contact email
#' @param citation Citation info
#' @param notes Notes
#' @param save_profile Save defaults to ~/.manifest_profile.R
#' @export
insert_manifestation <- function(
  script_name = NULL,
  purpose = NULL,
  author = NULL,
  email = NULL,
  citation = NULL,
  notes = NULL,
  save_profile = FALSE
) {
  if (!rstudioapi::hasFun("insertText")) stop("Requires RStudio.")
  
  profile_path <- path.expand("~/.manifest_profile.R")
  if (file.exists(profile_path)) source(profile_path, local = TRUE)

  get_default <- function(key, fallback = NULL) {
    if (exists("manifest_profile") && key %in% names(manifest_profile)) {
      manifest_profile[[key]]
    } else fallback
  }

  ctx <- rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()
  if (is.null(script_name)) {
    script_name <- if (nzchar(ctx$path)) basename(ctx$path) else "your_script.R"
  }

  purpose <- purpose   %||% rstudioapi::showPrompt("Purpose", "What does this script do?")
  author  <- author    %||% get_default("author")   %||% rstudioapi::showPrompt("Author", "Name:")
  email   <- email     %||% get_default("email")    %||% rstudioapi::showPrompt("Email", "Contact:")
  citation <- citation %||% get_default("citation") %||% rstudioapi::showPrompt("Citation", "How to cite:")
  notes    <- notes    %||% rstudioapi::showPrompt("Notes", "Notes/Instructions:")

  date <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")

  block <- c(
    "# 🌟 Manifestation Block",
    "# Today I create with clarity and purpose.",
    "# This script is aligned with my highest intentions.",
    "# I trust the process and learn through the journey.",
    "",
    "# Author details",
    paste0("## Script name: ", script_name),
    paste0("## Purpose of the script: ", purpose),
    paste0("## Author(s): ", author),
    paste0("## Date Created: ", date),
    paste0("## Date Last Modified: ", date),
    paste0("## Copyright statement: ",
            get_default("copyright", "All rights reserved")),
    paste0("## Contact information: ", email),
    paste0("## Please cite: ", citation),
    paste0("## Notes: ", notes),
    ""
  )

  rstudioapi::insertText(paste(block, collapse = "\n"))

  if (isTRUE(save_profile)) {
    manifest_profile <- list(
      author = author,
      email = email,
      citation = citation,
      copyright = get_default("copyright")
    )
    dput(manifest_profile, file = profile_path)
    message("✔ Manifestation profile saved to ~/.manifest_profile.R")
  }
}

# fallback operator
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b
```

## 🧠 PART 3: Enable as RStudio Addin

`inst/rstudio/addins.dcf`

```
Name: Insert Manifestation Header
Description: Insert a manifestation and author block into the script
Binding: insert_manifestation
Interactive: false
```

## 📝 PART 4: DESCRIPTION File

```r
Package: jyotirmoymanifest
Title: Insert Manifestation and Author Blocks in R Scripts
Version: 0.1.0
Authors@R: 
    person("Jyotirmoy", "Das", email = "jyotirmoy.das@liu.se", 
           role = c("aut", "cre"),
           comment = c(ORCID = "0000-0001-XXXX-XXXX"))
Description: 
    Provides an RStudio Addin and function to insert a customizable "manifestation block" 
    and author metadata into R scripts.
License: GPL-3
Encoding: UTF-8
Roxygen: list(markdown = TRUE)
RoxygenNote: 7.3.2
Depends: 
    R (>= 3.5.0)
Imports: 
    rstudioapi
```

## 📰 PART 5: NEWS.md (Changelog)

```{markdown}
# jyotirmoymanifest News

## v0.1.0 - 2024-06-24 🎉

- Initial release of `insert_manifestation()` RStudio Addin
- Supports interactive prompts for author info and citation
- Auto-loads user defaults from `~/.manifest_profile.R`
- Saves user profile if requested
```

## 🧪 PART 6: Build, Document, Install
```r
devtools::document()
devtools::install()
```

## 🚀 PART 7: Push to GitHub

### A. Initialize Git and link:
```r
usethis::use_git()
usethis::use_github()
```

### B. Tag a release (optional):
```r
git tag -a v0.1.0 -m "Initial public release"
git push origin v0.1.0
```

## 📦 PART 8: Install the Package Anywhere

`remotes::install_github("JD2112/jyotirmoymanifest")`


## 🌐 PART 9: Create ~/.manifest_profile.R for User Defaults
```r
manifest_profile <- list(
  author = "Jyotirmoy Das, Ph.D.",
  email = "jyotirmoy.das@liu.se",
  citation = "@article{...}",
  copyright = "GNU"
)
```

## 📘 PART 10: README.md Example
```{markdown}
# jyotirmoymanifest

[![License: GPL-3](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPL--3-blue.svg)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
```

## 🚀 Installation

`remotes::install_github("JD2112/jyotirmoymanifest")`

## 🧘 Usage
```r
library(jyotirmoymanifest)
insert_manifestation()

#local check package
devtools::check()
```
